title: Create BlueMap
description: A mod adding Create support to BlueMap
body:
![Carriages shown on BlueMap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e75abf7d9c3fd67402f851d00394148ad37c4f00.png)
*Create BlueMap is a mod that lets you see the Create Mod trains and tracks on BlueMap*


## Features
- Displaying train carriages (schedules shown as blue)
- Displaying trains as markers (has to be enabled in config)
- Displaying train lines (has to be enabled in config, can be laggy on large networks)

## Dependencies
- Create
- BlueMap
- Fzzy Config
<small>(fabric only)</small>

*This is a third party mod, not approved by or associated with Create or BlueMap developers.*
